use_cases: Switching between sections of a product dashboard or settings page
Organizing content into categories like Overview, Billing, and Transactions
Space-efficient content navigation in SaaS applications
Mobile-friendly tab navigation with adaptive dropdown select
Admin panel or content management interface navigation
ai_summary: A vertical tab navigation component built with Radix UI that adapts between desktop sidebar-style tabs and mobile dropdown select for responsive tab switching. Styled with Tailwind CSS for a clean, minimal appearance with clear hover and active state indicators. Provides accessible keyboard navigation out of the box.
